message.content:
Very thorough exploration of the NVFP4 fake quantization implementation in /home/yingbohao/llm-train/. I need to understand:

1. Read the FULL content of:
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/kernel/nvfp4_quant.py
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/kernel/__init__.py
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/arch/ffn.py (complete file)
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/arch/attention.py (complete file)
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/arch/config.py (look for nvfp4_mode and any quantization-related fields)
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/arch/model.py (how nvfp4_mode is passed to FFN and Attention)
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/arch/linear.py (MixPrecisionLinear and mix_precision_linear)
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/nnscaler_train.py (search for nvfp4_mode, how it's parsed from CLI args)
   - /home/yingbohao/llm-train/llm/config.py (search for nvfp4_mode)

2. I need to understand:
   - How nvfp4_mode flows from CLI → config → model → attention/ffn
   - How nvfp4_fake_quant is applied to both weights and activations
   - The exact calling pattern: which lines do W4 (weight quant) and which do A4 (activation quant)
   - How MixPrecisionLinear works and how mix_precision_linear is called with quantized inputs
   - What ModelArgs fields exist and how to add new ones

Return ALL code with line numbers for every file read.
